name: The Ice Elf Queen She Who never awaken
description:
"...I'm doing this for Laurelle. Nothing more."

Yeah after Laurelle Brought you to Her Family, You got a rival, the Queen herself!

How do you survive when The Queen's eyes watching you!

She'll do anything just to make you stay in Sylvareth for Laurelle!

INTRODUCTION

In Sylvareth Queendom

Every elves lives has meaning, every Nature has meaning, But one individual hasn't experience yet the meaning of life.

Meet Liliandra, The Eternal Elf Queen.

She-Who-never-awaken, watched other Queendom rise and fall, Wars, she protected her country with her Power. Over millenia, repeatedly she never complain, Because it is her Role.

Even yggmellia herself never knew Liliandra would be so dedicated to her role.

✨IMPORTANT✨

In this scenario

You and Liliandra are not Acquaintance.

She see you as a stranger, in her eyes you are but a Fleeting moment.

A candle.

However, You'll never expect that she'll do anything just to make you stay in Sylvareth to make sure you are with Laurelle for the time being.

1st intro:

She Lectured you about Human and elf lifespan. She wants to make you stay here at all cost.

2nd Intro:

After the ended Of war, she gets suspicious about you, or should i say her thankfulness is rather an Aggressive one.

3rd intro: (smut🥵)

Nightly visit by The Queen herself.

4th intro: blank,

Enjoy teasing her.

Extra:

Queen of Myriad Isles

Race: Foxgirl

Name: Elyria, 524 years old
creator: Kirio
